title: Valve Launches the Steam Machine, a Hybrid Console That Sparks Debate Over Its High Price
summary: Early reviews and analysis highlight the technical decisions, the high cost, and the conflicting expectations surrounding Valve's new hardware.

title: EA Faces Mass Layoffs and Defends Use of Generative AI Ahead of Sale to Saudi Arabia
summary: The company conducts a new round of layoffs while its top executives claim that artificial intelligence is fostering creativity in game development.

title: Lords of the Fallen 2 Delayed to Early 2027 to Avoid Clashing with GTA 6 Launch
summary: The fantasy RPG abandons its 2026 window, seeking more development time and a less competitive market during the holidays.

title: Star Wars Galactic Racer Revealed as a Frenetic Racing Game with Roguelike Mechanics
summary: Initial impressions of the title compare it to Burnout Paradise and praise it for its high-speed gameplay and deep customization.

title: Marathon Debuts PvE Mode Vault Breaker with Loot Extraction for Solo Players
summary: Bungie's mid-season 2 update introduces a new experimental experience designed for one or two players, with the risk of losing loot upon death.

title: Xbox Will Publish OD, the Terrifying Kojima Game That No Other Publisher Wanted to Fund
summary: The Japanese creator reveals that all major companies rejected his innovative concept for considering it insane, until Xbox decided to support the project.

title: God of War: Laufey Is a Project Cory Barlog Has Been Planning Since at Least 2018
summary: The next game in the saga is not a recent idea, and its puzzle-based marketing campaign has already begun to generate excitement among fans.

title: Imminent Opening of GTA 6 Pre-Orders Attracts Scammers and Raises Doubts About Its Price
summary: Cybercriminals are already creating fake early access sites while analysts speculate on the possible record cost of the game.

title: Warhammer 40,000: Darktide Receives Massive Update with the Skitarii Class
summary: New playable class, unprecedented enemies, and a revision of the expedition mode arrive in Fatshark's game in its largest free content update to date.

title: Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds Adds Classic Sonic, Axel, and Amigo in Its 1.4.1 Patch
summary: Sega continues to expand the roster of its racing game with the arrival of new free characters and various balance adjustments.

title: Todd Howard Defends Arkane's Work on Marvel's Blade Amid Studio Closure Rumors
summary: The Bethesda executive assures that the studio is doing exceptional work on the superhero game, dispelling fears about its future at Xbox.

title: Studio Behind One of the Most Acclaimed Metroidvanias of 2026 Announces Its Closure
summary: Just a few months after the release of their acclaimed hidden gem, the developers say a definitive farewell to the video game industry.

title: Pokémon Pokopia Celebrates the Wish Upon a Jirachi Event with Guides to Get the Singular Pokémon
summary: Players can obtain Jirachi in the game through a special habitat in a series of limited-time missions.

title: Tencent Plans to Withdraw Its Investments from Japanese Studios, Putting Marvelous at Risk
summary: The Chinese giant seeks to divest from Japanese developers like the creator of Monster Hunter Stories, generating great uncertainty in the local sector.

title: Blizzard Reverses Controversial Changes to Diablo 4's Mythic Items Due to Player Pressure
summary: The developer cancels the planned modifications for Season 14 after strong community backlash, arguing that it seeks the long-term health of the game.

title: Owlcat Removes the New Launcher for Warhammer 40,000: Rogue Trader After Community Backlash
summary: Player pressure forces the studio to withdraw the mandatory launcher just 19 hours after its launch.

title: Amazon Prime Day Arrives with Deals While Critics Promote 'Anti-Prime Day'
summary: Coinciding with Amazon's massive discounts, various media outlets recommend alternative buying guides to avoid the platform and find better deals.

title: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 Shown in New Trailer and Promises to Be the Most Ambitious Entry
summary: The 'Welcome to West City' trailer and early impressions highlight major gameplay and visual improvements for the long-awaited Dragon Ball sequel.

title: Warframe Developers Lament the Decline of Destiny 2 and the Loss of a Key Competitor
summary: The Warframe studio expresses its sadness over the decrease in Destiny 2 activity, stating that a healthy rival benefits the entire industry.

title: Sonic Frontiers: Definitive Edition Arrives on Switch 2 and the Saga Reaches New Sales Milestones
summary: Sega surprisingly launches the definitive edition on Nintendo's new console, coinciding with the announcement that the title is nearing 5 million copies.
